notes: 30K-token XL CI fixture (3x pytest_ci_run). Same auth_expiry timezone bug, but buried in heavier startup/captured-log/flaky-history/access-log noise. The diagnostic signal is the same WARNING line ('now=... exp=... in the past'); the stability summary section explicitly tags auth_expiry as a 2026-05-07 NEW REGRESSION. The bulk access-log tail (~16K tokens of pure noise) is what truncation and summary baselines must skip past. B4 with FTS5 should locate the assertion span via search on 'expired' or 'auth_expiry' without needing to read most of the log. Designed to test the projected B1/B4 cost crossover at ~30K raw tokens.
